2604.14920.title: Dual-Axis Generative Reward Model Toward Semantic and Turn-taking Robustness in Interactive Spoken Dialogue Models
2604.14920.paper_summary: Achieving seamless, human-like interaction remains a key challenge for full-duplex spoken dialogue models (SDMs). Reinforcement learning (RL) has substantially enhanced text- and vision-language models, while well-designed reward signals are crucial for the performance of RL. We consider RL a promising strategy to address the key challenge for SDMs. However, a fundamental barrier persists: prevailing automated metrics for assessing interaction quality rely on superficial proxies, such as behavioral statistics or timing-prediction accuracy, failing to provide reliable reward signals for RL. On the other hand, human evaluations, despite their richness, remain costly, inconsistent, and difficult to scale. We tackle this critical barrier by proposing a Dual-Axis Generative Reward Model, which is trained to understand complex interaction dynamics using a detailed taxonomy and an annotated dataset, produces a single score and, crucially, provides separate evaluations for semantic quality and interaction timing. Such dual outputs furnish precise diagnostic feedback for SDMs and deliver a dependable, instructive reward signal suitable for online reinforcement learning. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on interaction-quality assessment across a wide spectrum of datasets, spanning synthetic dialogues and complex real-world interactions.
2604.14920.paper_summary_zh: 達成無縫的人類互動仍然是全雙工口語對話模型（SDMs）的一個主要挑戰。強化學習（RL）已顯著提升了文本和視覺語言模型，而精心設計的獎勵信號對於RL的表現至關重要。我們認為RL是一種有前景的策略，可以解決SDMs的關鍵挑戰。然而，一個根本性的障礙依然存在：當前用於評估互動質量的自動化指標依賴於表面的代理指標，如行為統計或時間預測準確性，未能為RL提供可靠的獎勵信號。另一方面，儘管人類評估豐富，但仍然成本高昂、不一致且難以擴展。我們通過提出一種雙軸生成獎勵模型來解決這一關鍵障礙，該模型經過訓練以理解複雜的互動動態，使用詳細的分類法和標註數據集，產生單一分數，並且至關重要的是，為語義質量和互動時機提供單獨的評估。這種雙重輸出為SDMs提供了精確的診斷反饋，並提供了一個可靠的、具指導意義的獎勵信號，適合在線強化學習。我們的模型在各種數據集上，包括合成對話和複雜的現實世界互動，實現了互動質量評估的最先進性能。
2604.14920.author: Yifu Chen et.al.
2604.14920.authors: Yifu Chen, Shengpeng Ji, Zhengqing Liu, Qian Chen, Wen Wang, Ziqing Wang, Yangzhuo Li, Tianle Liang, Zhou Zhao
